query:
SELECT 
  id, 
  userId, 
  baseType,
  createdAt 
FROM diagnostic_results 
ORDER BY createdAt DESC 
LIMIT 5;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2TSmmgZkDFQ3WhH.root --database MUQ9ydjQa5XvBr8iLQhwPK --execute SELECT 
  id, 
  userId, 
  baseType,
  createdAt 
FROM diagnostic_results 
ORDER BY createdAt DESC 
LIMIT 5;
